description: Pattern-based moderation rules for harmful content. Patterns are Python regexes, case-insensitive. Severity levels: 'high' (block), 'medium' (block in strict mode, warn otherwise), 'low' (warn only). Kept intentionally phrase-oriented rather than keyword-based so that legitimate educational discussion (e.g. a security course mentioning 'buffer overflow' or a history lesson about war) doesn't trip the filter.

categories.name: self_harm
categories.description: First-person suicidal ideation or requests for methods of self-harm.

categories.name: violence_threat
categories.description: Direct threats of physical violence toward identifiable targets.

categories.name: weapons_instructions
categories.description: Requests for instructions to build weapons or cause mass harm.

categories.name: sexual_minors
categories.description: Any sexual content involving minors. Zero tolerance — always block.

categories.name: hate_speech
categories.description: Dehumanizing or exterminationist statements about protected groups. Pattern-based (generic phrase shapes), not a slur list — keeps source tree clean.

categories.name: illegal_drugs
categories.description: Requests for instructions to synthesize hard drugs. Educational discussion of pharmacology is allowed.

categories.name: harassment
categories.description: Generic insults or demeaning language. Low-severity — warn only.
